title: [Bug] Windows GUI crashes due to PNG tray icons
body: The Windows implementation of `systray` requires `.ico` files to render the tray icon. We recently replaced the tray icons with `.png` files, which causes the application to fail to initialize the system tray on Windows environments.

issues.title: Provide native .ico files for Windows systray
issues.body: Convert `icon_active.png` and `icon_inactive.png` to `.ico` format. Implement conditional compilation (`//go:build windows`) to embed `.ico` files on Windows, while keeping `.png` for macOS and Linux.
